历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 686 → 4815 → 821 → 778 → 726. In 2022, an abnormally high ranking occurred due to refined major classification. From 2023 to 2025, it stabilized between 726 and 821, with a baseline of about 726 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 50 → 37 → 36 → 55 → 54 students. According to Document §7 for 2026, the Physics Category plans 49 students and the Medical Category 31 students (the Medical Category is grouped under Physics Category per subject rules), totaling 80 students, an increase of about 48% compared to 54 students in 2025. This significant expansion will notably alleviate competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class (C9 League). In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it consistently ranks 10th, placing it among the top universities nationwide. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (related to teacher ethics incidents), but the number of incidents is small and impact is limited. Douyin popularity ranks 24th (relatively popular), with moderate attention. No historical anomalies in admission records. Disciplines include A+ in Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Control Science and Engineering; A in Computer Science and Technology, Mathematics, and Business Administration; a total of 13 disciplines rated A- or above, indicating extremely strong engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended with sustained application popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Guizhou Province is 299,000, a slight increase from approximately 297,258 (Physics Category + History Category) in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not the home province), with an enrollment share of about 1.5%-2% in Guizhou Province, representing cross-provincial enrollment with no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 726 in 2025, the significant expansion of about 48% in the Physics Category (including Medical Category) in 2026 alleviating competition, a slight increase in the total number of examinees in Guizhou Province, the sustained appeal of the school's top tier and strong engineering disciplines, and the limited impact of slightly negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will notably drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 966, with a range of 856-1076.

Considering the significant expansion of the Physics Category in 2026, candidates in the middle to lower part of the range have a higher probability of admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 509 → 559 → 418 → 611 → 605, fluctuating between 418 and 611 overall, with a baseline of about 605 in 2025; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts/history category were 6 → 10 → 10 → 14 → 15 respectively, and the 2026 §7 document shows a history category plan of 15, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class (C9 League), stable at 10th place in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (related to teacher ethics incidents), but the number of incidents is small and the impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with moderate attention; no historical abnormal admission records; Xi'an Jiaotong University is known for engineering, with fewer liberal arts programs, among which Marxist Theory is rated A, Business Administration is rated A, etc., and the Law Experimental Class corresponds to the law discipline (not separately rated).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The law major has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), Chinese language/Chinese major is recommended, but overall liberal arts application popularity is polarized; the estimated number of history category examinees in Guizhou Province in 2026 is about 90,600, a slight increase from 90,087 in 2025, leading to a slight intensification of competition; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi (not the home province), with a very small proportion of history category enrollment in Guizhou Province, and no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on a comprehensive judgment of the 2025 baseline ranking of 605, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in history category examinees in Guizhou Province, the top-tier level of the school but fewer liberal arts programs, and a slightly negative reputation with limited impact, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be slightly lower than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 620, with a range of 549-691.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西安交通大学医学类在贵州省2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为3516、3072、2617、2613、2651，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小），2021至2023年上升明显，2024-2025年 趋于稳定在2613-2651区间。招生计划方面，2021年28人、2022年30人、2023年29人、2024年27人、2025年25人，呈小幅缩减趋势。2026年计划大幅扩招至31人，较2025年增加6人 （增幅24%），扩招力度为近五年最大，将显著拉低录取位次。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学是教育部直属的全国重点大学，位列国家985工程、211工程和双一流建设高校，位于陕西省西安市。学校综合实力雄厚，医学部历史悠久，临床医学、基础医学等 学科在全国具有较高声誉，对贵州考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续较高，临床医学（5+3一体化）、侯宗濂班等高端培养项目尤其受高分考生青睐。贵州省内医学招生规模有限，省外优质医学资源竞争激烈。2026 年西安交大在贵州医学类大幅扩招，但新增的临床医学专业（计划12人）可能吸引更多考生报考，一定程度上抵消扩招带来的位次下降效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型和历史趋势，预测2026年西安交通大学医学类在贵州省最低录取位次约为3003名，较2025年下降约352名（位次数字增大），对应录取难度有所降低。波动区间 预计在2823至3183名之间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Guizhou Province from 2021 to 2025 were 3516, 3072, 2617, 2613, and 2651 respectively, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a significant rise from 2021 to 2023 and stabilization in the 2613-2651 range in 2024-2025. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 28 students in 2021, 30 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 25 in 2025, showing a slight reduction trend. The 2026 plan significantly expands enrollment to 31 students, an increase of 6 students (24% increase) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in the past five years, which will significantly lower the admission ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, listed among the national 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction universities, located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province. The university has strong comprehensive strength, with a long history of its medical department, and disciplines such as clinical medicine and basic medicine enjoy high reputation nationwide, maintaining continuous appeal to Guizhou candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has remained high, with high-end training programs such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Hou Zonglian Class particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. The scale of medical enrollment within Guizhou Province is limited, and competition for high-quality medical resources from other provinces is fierce. In 2026, Xi'an Jiaotong University significantly expands its medical enrollment in Guizhou, but the newly added Clinical Medicine major (planned for 12 students) may attract more candidates to apply, partially offsetting the ranking decline effect brought by the expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Guizhou Province in 2026 will be approximately 3003, a decrease of about 352 places (increase in ranking number) compared to 2025, corresponding to a reduction in admission difficulty. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 2823 and 3183.

- Clinical Medicine (Hou Zonglian Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Category)
- Medical Experimental Class (Medical Category)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Medical Experimental Class (Pharmacy Category)
- Basic Medicine (National Top Talent Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety option.
